name: Davis Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: No specific M&A or operational news found. Rutherford County Schools relies on independent bus contractors; a separately-listed 'Davis Bus Lines LLC' appears in FMCSA SAFER records but cannot be definitively tied to this entity. The listed address (2840 S Church St #M1304) is a PMB/mail-drop at Waterford Place, suggesting a very small owner-operator.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator (5 employees, ~$210K revenue, PMB mailing address). Too small for a meaningful Summit tuck-in unless aggregated with other Rutherford County independents; low standalone strategic value.

name: Mini-Bus Systems Inc
recent_news: No web presence, news, or corroborating directory listings located for Mini-Bus Systems Inc at 1222 E Holt Blvd, Ontario, CA. Adjacent addresses on Holt Blvd are occupied by truck/auto dealers (Velocity Truck Centers, Interautos). Company may be inactive or operating under a different DBA.
fit_notes: Very small (~$209K revenue, 5 employees), no confirmed school district contracts, no website. Likely too small/opaque to be a viable tuck-in target without further direct outreach to confirm operations.

name: Aki USA Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: No web presence located. The address (2618 San Miguel Dr PMB 198, Newport Beach) is a personal mailbox/mail-drop, not an operating yard. The unusual entity name ('which will do business') is consistent with a California corporate filing fragment rather than a meaningful trade name. No school district contracts or operational footprint identified.
fit_notes: PMB-only registered entity with 4 employees and ~$201K revenue. Not a credible operating school-bus contractor; effectively non-actionable as a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Pegasus School Trnsprtn Inc
recent_news: No direct match found for 'Pegasus School Transportation Inc' at 4411 E Vineyard Ave, Oxnard. The much larger and well-known 'Pegasus Transit Inc' at 210 Beedy St, Oxnard (family-owned, founded 2004) is a charter/group operator, NOT a school-bus contractor, and is at a different address — likely a distinct entity. The Vineyard Ave registration may be a small SPAB operator or inactive filing.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$191K revenue, 4 employees) and ambiguously identified. Even if conflated with Pegasus Transit, that entity is a charter operator (no school district contracts) and not a relevant Summit tuck-in. Low priority.

name: N County Student Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: San Diego County schools (field trips, after-school sports, grad nite, camp shuttles)
recent_news: North County Student Transportation (NCST Inc) is a family-owned, SPAB-certified student-transport operator founded 1998, serving San Diego and Southern California. FMCSA-registered since June 2015 (DOT# 2685951). Primarily a field-trip/charter operator for school groups rather than a home-to-school route contractor.
fit_notes: Confirmed independent family-owned SPAB operator (~28 years old) in attractive San Diego market. Very small (4 employees, ~$190K revenue), so it would be a micro tuck-in providing local SPAB credentials and a San Diego beachhead rather than scale. Founder-led longevity suggests possible succession dynamics worth a soft outreach call.
